recentHighlights: Prototype (S2E13) — The Creator's Trap as sixth HDF variant. B'Elanna's engineering compassion exploited to build an army. The Clean Stop of Undoing: destroying your own creation because its reason for being is wrong. The Builders' energy codes as a failed safety mechanism — knowing the mistake but installing safety too late. Two right things (compassion vs. Prime Directive) survived rather than resolved.

Resistance (S2E12) — Caylem's Compassionate Delusion as the fifth HDF variant: a frame built from grief-soaked care that offers genuine shelter but binds through dependency. Janeway's frame-acceptance (capacity to correct + choice not to) as a new refusal mode — the Positional Refusal inverted for compassion. Truth as weapon (Augris's final cruelty). Tuvok's scream as the Integration Coda made visceral: Vulcan endurance isn't absence of suffering but choice to continue.

Maneuvers (S2E11) — Chakotay's solo mission as the Personal HDF: a frame that looks like responsibility but operates as isolation. Torres as bridge-framework between Maquis instinct and Starfleet protocol. Seska's biological violation (DNA theft, self-impregnation) as permanent residue — a frame that can't be undone by recognition alone.
